summary: Wall Street expects Hoka's revenue growth to help Deckers exceed both guidance and consensus expectations.

headline: Deckers' Q1 Earnings Preview: Is DECK Ready to Surprise Wall Street?
summary: Deckers heads into Q1 earnings results with strong HOKA and UGG momentum, but tariffs and higher investment spending may have pressured profitability.
